title: 点菜
description_uz: «Bu yerda nima mazali?» — restoranda ofitsiant bilan stol, menyu va taom haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog taom tanlash, narx so'rash va ichimlik buyurtma qilishni mashq qiladi. Tanish vaziyat va kafeda kerak bo'ladigan foydali so'zlar. Rolni o'ynab takrorlash va gapirishga ishonch hosil qilish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «А что у вас вкусное?» — разговор с официантом о столике, меню и блюдах в ресторане. Этот диалог отрабатывает выбор блюда, вопрос о цене и заказ напитка. Знакомая ситуация и полезные слова, которые пригодятся в кафе. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры и уверенности в речи.
description_en: «What's good here?» — a chat with a waiter about a table, the menu, and the dishes at a restaurant. This dialogue practises choosing a dish, asking about price, and ordering a drink. A familiar situation and handy words you'll need in any café. Great for role-play and building speaking confidence.

sentences.text_original: 你好！请问现在有位置吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Qǐng wèn xiàn zài yǒu wèi zhi ma?
sentences.text_translation: Salom! Kechirasiz, hozir bo'sh joy bormi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Здравствуйте! Скажите, есть ли сейчас места?
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello! Excuse me, are there any seats available now?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yǒu. Qǐng zuò zhè biān. Zhè shì cài dān.
sentences.text_translation: Bor. Marhamat, bu yoqqa o'tiring. Mana menyu.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Есть. Садитесь сюда, пожалуйста. Вот меню.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. Please sit here. Here's the menu.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 谢谢。你们店有什么好吃的？
sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie. Nǐ men diàn yǒu shén me hǎo chī de?
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks. What's good to eat at your place?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我们的鱼和鸡肉都很好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men de yú hé jī ròu dōu hěn hǎo chī.
sentences.text_translation: Bizning baliq va tovuq go'shtimiz juda mazali.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Наша рыба и курица очень вкусные.
sentences.text_translation_en: Our fish and chicken are both delicious.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng chī yú. Yú guì bu guì?
sentences.text_translation_en: I'd like fish. Is the fish expensive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú guì. Yí fèn yú èr shí bā kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Qimmat emas. Bir porsiya baliq yigirma sakkiz yuan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не дорогая. Одна порция рыбы — двадцать восемь юаней.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not expensive. One portion of fish is twenty-eight yuan.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Wǒ hái yào yí ge tāng.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi. Yana bitta sho'rva ham olaman.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. I'd also like a soup.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你要什么汤？我们有鸡蛋汤和菜汤。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yào shén me tāng? Wǒ men yǒu jī dàn tāng hé cài tāng.
sentences.text_translation: Qanaqa sho'rva xohlaysiz? Bizda tuxum sho'rva va sabzavotli sho'rva bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Какой суп вы хотите? У нас есть яичный суп и овощной суп.
sentences.text_translation_en: What soup would you like? We have egg soup and vegetable soup.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 鸡蛋汤吧。再来一碗米饭。
sentences.pinyin: Jī dàn tāng ba. Zài lái yì wǎn mǐ fàn.
sentences.text_translation: Tuxum sho'rva bo'la qolsin. Yana bir kosa guruch ham bering.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Давайте яичный суп. И ещё миску риса.
sentences.text_translation_en: Egg soup, then. And bring a bowl of rice too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的。你喝什么？我们有茶和果汁。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de. Nǐ hē shén me? Wǒ men yǒu chá hé guǒ zhī.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi. Nima ichasiz? Bizda choy va meva sharbati bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. Что будете пить? У нас есть чай и сок.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure. What would you like to drink? We have tea and juice.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: I'd like a cup of tea.
sentences.speaker: A
